title: A Simple Hydration Plan That Actually Works
summary: No fancy rules — just an easy routine you can stick to.
content: Drink a full glass when you wake up, one with each meal, and one mid-afternoon.
Keep a bottle where you work and refill it at lunch.
If your pee is consistently dark yellow, add one more glass.

title: The 10-Min Walking Rule
summary: If you can do 10 minutes, you can build momentum.
content: You’re lowering the activation energy — starting is the hardest part.
Commit to 10 minutes. If you feel good, keep going. If not, you still won.
